name: tool_intent_memory
description: SQLite-backed CRUD for per-intent persistent memory.

intent.description: Target intent namespace for memory isolation (for example: routine_automation, hebcal).

section.description: Section heading (for example: ALIASES, OFFSETS, USER DEFINED, DATES).

key.description: Optional stable key for idempotent upsert/update/delete.

entry_markdown.description: Markdown line or block to persist.

context.description: Optional context for when/why the memory applies.

query.description: Optional text filter for read operations.
